repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
titles_tesim: Book of the Nativity of Our Lady by Jacob the Apostle
Encomium by St. Andrew Bishop of Crete and another by Bishop Abdallah ibn al-Fadl addressed to St. Nicolaus
Mimars by SS. John Damascene and John Chrysostom
contents_tesim: Book of the Nativity of Our Lady by Jacob the Apostle
Encomium by St. Andrew Bishop of Crete and another by Bishop Abdallah ibn al-Fadl addressed to St. Nicolaus

Encomium by St. Andrew Bishop of Crete and another by Bishop Abdallah ibn al-Fadl addressed to St. Nicolaus, a third by St. Pericles Patriarch of Constantinople to St. Stephens first martyr, and an anonymous elegy

Lives of Saints and Martyrdoms including those of SS. Peter Patriarch of Alexandria, Jeremiah, al-Harith of Nagran and his companions, Jacob the Apostle, Athanasius of Al-Qulzum, Sergius and Bacchus, Theodorus, Mercurius, Procopius, Panteleemon, Agathangelus, Demetrius and his pupil Nestor, Eustratius, Auxentius, Eugenius, Aristus, Mardarius, the forty martyrs of Sebastia, Eustace together with his wife and two children, Euclid and Joseph the Jew
Mimars by SS. John Damascene and John Chrysostom
full_text_tesim: Book of the Nativity of Our Lady by Jacob the Apostle

Encomium by St. Andrew Bishop of Crete and another by Bishop Abdallah ibn al-Fadl addressed to St. Nicolaus, a third by St. Pericles Patriarch of Constantinople to St. Stephens first martyr, and an anonymous elegy

Lives of Saints and Martyrdoms including those of SS. Peter Patriarch of Alexandria, Jeremiah, al-Harith of Nagran and his companions, Jacob the Apostle, Athanasius of Al-Qulzum, Sergius and Bacchus, Theodorus, Mercurius, Procopius, Panteleemon, Agathangelus, Demetrius and his pupil Nestor, Eustratius, Auxentius, Eugenius, Aristus, Mardarius, the forty martyrs of Sebastia, Eustace together with his wife and two children, Euclid and Joseph the Jew
Mimars by SS. John Damascene and John Chrysostom
